compiled_state.title: EV-2a: remove PROJECT_ROOT env var (REBAR_ROOT only)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Remove the PROJECT_ROOT env var (unprefixed duplicate of REBAR_ROOT; hard-remove per env-var review decision var 2). Slice of EV-2 / 77aa. REBAR_ROOT remains the single repo-root override, so behavior is preserved for anyone already using REBAR_ROOT.

## Scope / Deliverables
- Drop ' or os.environ.get("PROJECT_ROOT")' at the ~23 src read sites: config.py repo_root, _engine_support/reads.py (also fix its reversed PROJECT_ROOT-before-REBAR_ROOT order), _cli/_init.py, _commands/txn.py + init.py, and _engine/rebar_reconciler/* (apply_planning, health, applier, rebar_id_audit, inbound_translate, batch_dispatch, apply_inbound, reconcile, fetcher, invariants, __main__).
- Remove PROJECT_ROOT from config._env_signature.
- Migrate the ~14 test files that set PROJECT_ROOT to REBAR_ROOT.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No os.environ read of PROJECT_ROOT remains in src (REBAR_ROOT only)
- [ ] reads.py root resolution honors REBAR_ROOT consistently (reversed-order site fixed)
- [ ] Tests migrated to REBAR_ROOT; full non-integration suite green

comments.body: DONE (config-loop, commit b584f267). Hard-removed PROJECT_ROOT (unprefixed duplicate of REBAR_ROOT, env-var review var 2); REBAR_ROOT is now the single repo-root override. AC1 (no os.environ read of PROJECT_ROOT in src): collapsed every "REBAR_ROOT or PROJECT_ROOT" chain to REBAR_ROOT across config.py, reads.py, _cli/_init.py, _commands/{txn,init}.py, and 11 reconciler modules; engine_env no longer pins PROJECT_ROOT (dropped the vestigial REBAR_ROOT<->PROJECT_ROOT mirror branch — an inherited REBAR_ROOT carries through dict(os.environ)); removed PROJECT_ROOT from config._env_signature. grep confirms ZERO PROJECT_ROOT references remain in src OR tests. AC2 (reads.py reversed-order fixed): reads.py:75 previously resolved PROJECT_ROOT-before-REBAR_ROOT (PROJECT_ROOT winning) — now REBAR_ROOT only, consistent with config.repo_root. AC3 (tests migrated + green): removed all PROJECT_ROOT set/delenv from ~13 test files (REBAR_ROOT was co-set in every SET site — verified); added 2 regression tests (repo_root honors REBAR_ROOT; ignores a lone PROJECT_ROOT). Full offline suite green: 1929 passed, 9 skipped. Also synced docs/scripts (architecture.md, README, probe-rebar.sh). Subagent review: src+tests ship-ready, no broken or-chains, fail-closed verify gate untouched, no behavior regression beyond the intended PROJECT_ROOT-only break (verified PROJECT_ROOT+REBAR_ROOT were always co-set; only an external caller setting ONLY the unprefixed PROJECT_ROOT is affected — exactly the duplicate being removed); remediated the doc/script stragglers it flagged. NOTE: init.py module docstring has a PRE-EXISTING "ignores REBAR_ROOT" vs code-reads-REBAR_ROOT inconsistency (not introduced here) — left for a follow-up. Parent 77aa now blocked only by EV-2b.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

file_impact.reason: PROJECT_ROOT set/delenv removed + repo_root regression tests
